query: 2026 Tour de France Stage 19 Gap to Alpe d'Huez July 24 - profile, favorites, and any preview analysis. Historical base rate of how often Alpe d'Huez summit finishes are won by breakaway vs GC favorites vs Pogačar specifically.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on 2026 Tour de France Stage 19 to Alpe d'Huez:

## Stage 19 Profile (Fri, July 24, 2026)
- **~128 km, Gap → Alpe d'Huez**, ~3,500 m climbing — a short, explosive mountain stage
- **Final climb:** Alpe d'Huez, 13.8 km @ 8.1%, 21 hairpins, summit ~1,860 m
- **Prior climbs:** Col Bayard (4.7km@7.2%), Col du Noyer (7.2km@8.3–8.5%), Col d'Ornon (5.4km@6.2–6.4%)
- **Unique context:** First of an unprecedented **back-to-back Alpe d'Huez double-header** (Stage 20 climbs via Col de Sarenne the next day); first men's Tour visit since Pidcock's 2022 win

## Favorites & Race Context
- **Top tier:** Pogačar, Vingegaard, Paul Seixas; **second tier:** Ayuso, Arensman, L. Martinez, Del Toro
- **GC (through Stage 9, latest completed):** Pogačar in yellow +2:42 over Vingegaard; he took command with a record-setting long-range Tourmalet attack (Stage 6)
- **Notable:** Neither Pogačar nor Vingegaard has *ever* won a stage at Alpe d'Huez

## Historical Base Rate (Breakaway vs GC vs Pogačar)
- **Breakaways dominate the modern era:** Of the last 5 road-stage finishes (2011 Rolland, 2013 Riblon, 2015 Pinot, 2018 Thomas, 2022 Pidcock), **4 of 5 (80%) went to breakaway riders** — only 2018 (Thomas) was won by the yellow jersey
- Over the last ~9 finishes (2001–2022): roughly **55–60% breakaway/non-GC-leader wins, ~40–45% GC-contender decisive attacks** (Armstrong '01, Sastre '08, Thomas '18)
- **Yellow-jersey wins on the Alpe are rare** (essentially only Thomas 2018 in the modern era)
- **Pogačar-specific:** 0 career wins at Alpe d'Huez

**Key caveat:** The outcome is highly regime-dependent — whether a break or a favorite wins hinges on the GC gap, bonus/record incentives, and, uniquely in 2026, how teams weigh Stage 19 against the Stage 20 queen stage (which could increase the chance a breakaway is allowed to win Stage 19).

Full structured findings with all data points and sources have been recorded.
